reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_242]]
Speaker 3: All right, we’ve come to our final question.

[[BLOCK:srt_243]]
Speaker 3: I’d like to ask each of you to share one sentence as a message for our graduates—

[[BLOCK:srt_244]]
Speaker 3: I think the best way to answer this question is to speak directly to the camera.

[[BLOCK:srt_245]]
Speaker 3: In other words, for this last question, we’d like to invite both of you to say a few words straight to our students—

[[BLOCK:srt_246]]
Speaker 1: Right—when will we be speaking to them? So this question is—

[[BLOCK:srt_247]]
Speaker 2: Or will they be watching us?

[[BLOCK:srt_248]]
Speaker 3: It would be best to address them directly, since the message is for the students. Just look into the camera and say it, okay?

[[BLOCK:srt_249]]
Speaker 3: This final question is intended for the students attending tomorrow’s commencement ceremony, as well as those who will participate in future ceremonies.

[[BLOCK:srt_250]]
Speaker 3: As I mentioned earlier, if you could leave our graduates with just one sentence of encouragement, what would it be?

[[BLOCK:srt_251]]
Speaker 3: You don’t need to decide on the exact wording right now.

[[BLOCK:srt_252]]
Speaker 3: When the time comes, you can simply say it directly to them.

[[BLOCK:srt_253]]
Speaker 1: That camera.
